The same May 5 artifact is installed to /home/mcp/.local/bin/vibe-kanban-serve and /home/mcp/.local/bin/vibe-kanban-serve-prod.
The May 5 pre-restart backup is /home/mcp/backups/vk-pre-restart-manual-20260505T161804Z.
The failed May 5 lean-backup archive attempt at /home/mcp/backups/vk-lean-restore-20260505T160819Z is incomplete and should not be treated as the valid pre-restart backup.
Live runtime guardrails are persisted in /home/mcp/.config/systemd/user/vibe-kanban.service.d/runtime-guardrails.conf.

Required live guardrails include CODEX_HOME=/home/mcp/.local/share/vibe-kanban/codex-home, VK_USE_SYSTEMD_RUN=1, VK_DISABLE_PR_MONITOR=1, VK_TRANSIENT_MEMORY_HIGH=1500M, VK_TRANSIENT_MEMORY_MAX=3000M, VK_CODEX_BASE_COMMAND=/home/mcp/.local/bin/codex, DISABLE_WORKTREE_CLEANUP=1, and VK_ALLOWED_ORIGINS=https://vibe.local.
crates/server/build.rs now tracks packages/local-web/dist so frontend rebuilds invalidate the embedded frontend binary correctly.
Finished-process normalized chat replay now serves a fully normalized finite history stream, avoiding the temp MsgStore snapshot/live race that could leave chats blank.

Large finished transcripts now replay incrementally from disk and the frontend paints partial historic chat while replay is still loading, which fixes blank opens in workspaces like FR:: Garmin Sync Down.
Duplicate attachment hash collisions now reuse the existing attachment record instead of returning a 500 from /api/attachments/upload.
Workspace summary responses now use a short 2s in-process cache keyed by archived state to reduce repeated identical query bursts against SQLite.
Workspace chat session selection now stays pinned to the current existing session during same-workspace follow-up refreshes instead of falling back to the empty conversation state.
Editor attachment and image nodes now scope local metadata/proxy/file URLs through the current host path, which should remove the first-screen attachment mismatch.
Session/workspace/scratch event websockets now fail closed on broadcast lag so the client can reconnect and replay fresh state instead of freezing on stale chat/process status.
Issue-route workspace creation now passes explicit linked issue/project context into submit, avoiding dropped issue links when the draft bootstrap state is stale.
Workspace create-and-start now retries local linked-issue task resolution briefly before giving up, which covers freshly created issues that are not discoverable on the first lookup.
The three broken live workspace links from 2026-04-22 were repaired through the normal workspace link API and now point at their correct issues again.
Normalized chat log websocket delivery now batches patches for 50ms and coalesces repeated writes to the same entry path before sending them to the browser.

The live normalized-log replay for process d928142b-d587-4a16-9e23-013d1a6df622 dropped from roughly 3872 websocket patch messages / 5.07 GB over 20s to roughly 60 patch messages / 109.6 MB after the server-side coalescing change.
Direct Codex app-server command-output delta normalization now truncates streaming tool output instead of appending unbounded stdout into chat entries.
For process d928142b-d587-4a16-9e23-013d1a6df622, normalized replay now completes in about 367ms across 8 websocket messages after the command-output truncation fix.
The generic JSON-patch websocket hook now preserves the current snapshot across reconnect retries for the same endpoint instead of clearing chat state on retryNonce-driven reconnect cleanup.

Post-redeploy, the orchestration session 65c4bde9-df70-4e12-91fd-210c41e7aa3a still serves the execution-process snapshot plus Ready, and normalized replay for process e9217d86-70b9-40f1-99d3-eea14c70975e completes in about 71ms with 2 websocket messages.
